content_body: What a beautiful cabin and beautiful area. We had a wonderful time this week. Fun yaking, tubing, white water rafting were some of the few things we did. Nantahala River is great for whitewater rafting with younger children. Just a short scenic drive. Blue Ridge Scenic Railroad was also a hit. Chloe was a welcomer visitor. I think she made it a little easier for our girls who missed their dog at home. We had a beautiful week!
title: Fabulous Family Fun with Cabin Rentals of Georgia
